Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understanding the Current Model Issues The current model has this structure 1 Create Purchase Requisition sequence 2 Approve Purchase Requisition sequence 3 Parallel block containing Create Purchase Order Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice 4 Close Case The issue is that the parallel block allows all these activities to happen in any order which is incorrect

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Correct Procure to Pay Sequence The proper order should be 1 Create Purchase Requisition 2 Approve Purchase Requisition 3 Create Purchase Order 4 Receive Goods 5 Receive Invoice 6 Match Invoice to PO 7 Pay Invoice 8 Close Case Each step should happen in this strict sequence Theres no parallelism that makes sense in this simplified model

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Fixing the Model I need to replace the parallel block with a sequence that enforces the proper order Create Purchase Order Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Let me create the corrected model and explain why this fixes the issues
